dairy-free-savory-sausage-gravy.name: Dairy-free Savory Sausage Gravy
instructions: Break sausage apart in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook until starting to brown, 3 to 5 minutes. Add Worcestershire sauce and let it heat up before adding beef bouillon and nutmeg. Stir and cook sausage until no longer pink, 3 to 5 minutes more.
Reduce heat to medium-low and sprinkle in flour gradually. Cook, stirring constantly, until flour coats sausage and is completely absorbed. Cook for 1 to 2 minutes more.

Pour in almond milk gradually, stirring constantly until gravy starts to thicken, up to 12 minutes. Add a little more almond milk if too thick. Season with pepper and salt. Continue stirring vigorously until gravy reaches desired thickness.
Remove from heat and let cool. Taste and adjust seasoning as desired.

date-cake.name: Date Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9-inch square pan.
Combine water and raisins in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil and cook for 5 minutes. Remove from heat, then stir in chopped dates and baking soda. Set aside.

Cream together white sugar and butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in vanilla. Add flour, salt, and date mixture; mix until combined. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, about 45 minutes. Remove cake from the oven.
Set the oven to broil. Meanwhile, make the topping: Melt butter in a small saucepan; stir in brown sugar, walnuts, and cream until combined. Spread mixture over warm cake.
Place cake under preheated broiler and cook until top is lightly browned, about 3 minutes. Rotate cake as needed for even browning; watch carefully as the top can burn quickly under the broiler.

deep-fried-california-roll-rice-balls.name: Deep-fried California Roll Rice Balls
instructions: Toss together crabmeat and avocado in a medium bowl for the filling and place in the refrigerator to chill until needed. Place bread crumbs in a shallow bowl and set aside.
Bring water to a boil over high heat. Add rice; stir, cover, and remove from heat. Let sit until water is absorbed, about 5 minutes, then fluff with a fork.
When rice is set and still hot, blend in cream cheese, soy sauce, garlic salt, and pepper until cream cheese is fully incorporated and no chunks remain.

Scoop out a golf ball-sized handful of rice mixture and flatten it into a patty. Add about a heaping teaspoon avocado-crab filling into the center. Cup your hand and shape rice around filling. Roll between your hands to seal and get a good round shape; patch any holes with more rice if needed. Roll in bread crumbs until well coated. Repeat with remaining rice mixture and filling.
Heat oil in a deep fryer or large saucepan to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Cook 1 to 2 rice balls at a time in hot oil. If not fully submerged, let each side of rice ball fry until golden brown, about 30 seconds per side. Remove to a paper towel-lined plate to drain. Repeat with remaining rice balls.
Combine mayonnaise and Sriracha in a small bowl. Serve with rice balls for dipping.

delicious-chicken-thigh-fillets-in-curry.name: Delicious Chicken Thigh Fillets In Curry Sauce
delicious-chicken-thigh-fillets-in-curry.original_name: Deliciosos filetes de muslo de pollo en salsa de curry
instructions: Fits steaks with salt and pepper before starting with production.
Dore the chicken in a frying pan with some oil. Reserve.
Put the onion and pepper and pic into a food processor for 2 seconds, add it to the frying pan next to the wine.
Cuando se evapore el alcohol. Agrega el agua y seguidamente la harina.
Sal pepper to taste and then add the curry and let them cook everything till the salsa's nearly reduced.
Triture the salsa and put the chicken back into the frying pan next to the salsa. Just leave for 3 minutes, turn off and serve.

delicious-chocolate-cookies-comedera.name: Delicious Chocolate Cookies!
instructions: In a bowl add sugar, cocoa powder, wheat flour, yeast and ointment butter.
Mix the ingredients until a consistent and consistent mass forms.
Make small or medium balls with dough and place them next to each other with some distance on an oven plate.
Con la ayuda de un cuchillo haz varias rallas y aplasta un poco las bolas de mezcla, con el fin de proporcionarle una forma diferente.
3). Once ready let them rest a few minutes and enjoy.

delicious-colombian-fritters-comedera.name: Delicious Colombian Fritters
instructions: It starts the recipe and puts into a bowl, maize starch, sugar, yucca starch and baking powder.
Then add salt to taste and mix all the dry ingredients very well.
Procede y agrega el queso molido o rallado y el huevo. Mezcla muy bien hasta que vaya tomando forma.
Go ahead and pour the glass of water. Mix very but very well till you have a smooth and homogenous mass.
Warm up a frying pan with oil.
Take the soft dough and divide it into equal portions. Then make balls from the same pat and round.
Later, when the oil's hot. Add fringes and fry till they are well doradito and fluffy inside.
Put the fringes into an absorbing paper and when they are warm, you can taste them.
Enjoy!

delicious-lemon-bundt-cake-comedera.name: Delicious Lemon Bundt Cake
instructions: For this recipe I like to use a mixer as it's more useful and will give you more spontaneity. But if you don't have the equipment, there's no problem. You can do that manually, but you'll need a lot of force in your arms. You can do it!
In a bowl, you'll add butter and sugar and we'll beat at an average speed for 5 minutes. When we put these two ingredients together, we will get a whiteness and very creamy mixture.
Slow down your mixer and you will add the eggs, one by one progressively until they have all been integrated.
Later you will add the juice and the fringes of lemons, mix very well.
Mix wheat flour and baking powder, sig them.
Finally, we will soon add half of wheat flour, mix very well.
We stop the mixer and we will use a miser or pat to incorporate the rest of the flour and with wrapped movements we will mix. Be sure there aren't any clumps.
Preheat your oven at 170 degrees Celsius.
Fold your boldt with some butter. Stretch the mixture into the mold and give some noodle so that there's no air at the bottom and everything's settled.

Hornea for about 45 minutes, at this time should be super ready. But, apply the technique of inserting a wooden stick, if you get out humerus, you'll leave it 5 minutes more, if it gets completely dry, it's more than perfect.
We're done! Let cool so that you can crumble and taste.
Enjoy!

diet-sandwich-lezzet.name: Diet Sandwich
instructions: 1. Crush white cheese with fork.
2. Peel and crush garlic.
3. Shake the eggplants in the oven and peel the shells.
4. Take on a pit tab.
5. Add and mix lemon juice, salt, oil, yogurt and cheese.
6. Share eggplant porridge on breads and wrap it in roll form.
7. Serve.
8. If you wish, you can also browse the sandwich recipe with plenty of cheeses with mild and low-calorie.

dinner-rolls.name: Dinner Rolls
instructions: Combine the warm milk (110-115˚F or 45˚C), melted butter, warm water (110-115˚F  or 45˚C), and sugar in a large bowl and stir until mixed.
Sprinkle the yeast evenly over the top of the mixture and let sit for 1 minute.
Add the salt, egg, and 4 cups (500g) of flour. Mix until the mixture just comes together and forms a dough.
Cover for 30 minutes with a towel or plastic wrap.
Uncover, and mix in the remaining cup of flour, and turn out onto a well-floured surface.
Knead the dough until it forms a smooth ball and loses some of its stickiness.
Cover for 30 more minutes with a towel or plastic wrap.
Preheat the oven to 375˚F (190˚C).
Uncover, and roll dough into 16 equal balls, roughly the size of a tangerine. Ensure the rolls are smooth with no cracks.
Place the rolls in a greased cast iron pan and brush with water.
Add desired toppings, or customize with your own!
Honey Butter - Combine the melted butter with the honey and brush onto rolls.
Jalapeño Cheddar - Top the rolls with cheddar and diced jalapeño.
Garlic Parmesan - Top the rolls with melted butter, parsley, garlic, and Parmesan.
Bacon Cheddar Chive - Top the rolls with cheddar, diced cooked bacon, and chives.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until rolls have lightly browned.
Enjoy!

dominican-stewed-chicken-recipe-comedera.name: Dominican Stewed Chicken Recipe

ingredients.item: 25 oz (600 gr) de pollo troceado ((muslos, pechuga))

instructions: Start your recipe and add chicken pieces into a big bowl, add lemon juice, oregano, salt and pepper to suit. Mix and leave marines for 5 minutes.
At the same time, get the onion and the ajies into julians. Flettle the garlic and chew the tomato and the sky. Reserve separately.
Agrega el celery, la cebolla y el ajo troceado al pollo. Mezcla y deja marinar por 25 minutos.
After that time, you're gonna heat up a saucer or wok with olive oil, put down the fire and add 3 tablespoons of sugar. Let them caramelize.
When the sugar is caramelized, add the chicken pieces and book the other ingredients where it was marinated.
Cocina el pollo a fuego bajo mientras e vaya caramelizando con el resto de ingredientes.
Once they're golden, add some water. Cover and cook for 10 minutes with medium heat.
At this point you'll add his tomato and his chili and his other ingredients.
Mix, cover and cook for another 5 minutes.
After that time, add tomato sauce, olives, rectify with salt and pepper. Mix and cook till the salsa's dense.
Apaga, deja reposar y sirve.
Enjoy!

donut-lezzet.name: Donut
instructions: 1. For chocolate cream, take egg yolks, corn starch, milk, powder sugar and a pinch salt into a sauce pot.
2. Cook constantly stirring with wire whipping.
3. Add the chocolate that you are divided into small pieces and mix it up to eriye.
4. Add the vanilla extract and butter and continue mixing.
5. Cover the mixture with a rough stretch film and hold 2-3 hours in the refrigerator.
6.  For the frost, take the chocolate heat resistant rough when you split small pieces and melt in the microwave oven.
7. Take off and edge.
8. Cook the butter and powder sugar into the whisker container and until it comes to the cream consistency.
9. Egg, vanilla extract and add the chocolate you melt, and continue to cook.
10. blend flour, cocoa, baking powder, carbonate and a pinch salt in a separate container.
11. 11. Add the butter mixture and radiated lunar and mix the whole material thoroughly until it comes out.
12. Wrap the dough with stretch film and leave it in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
12. August   open the machine to be 2-3 cm thickness with the help of broadcasting and a roller.
14 July Cut parts from dough with the help of a round mold.
15. Then remove small rounds from the full hub of dough with a small mold.
16. Repeat the same process until all dough finishes.
17. September Shake the dough in the angry oil until you turn the colors.
18. Take more fat on paper towel.
19. September Take the chocolate cream into a very thin tipping bag.
20. Tighten the chocolate cream inside by opening 3-4 holes from each of the donuts.
21. Take the butter, milk, corn syrup and vanilla essence into a small pot.
22. Heat and get from the stove.
23. Add the chocolate you have split into small pieces and mix until you're hungry.
24. Add powder sugar and continue mixing.
25. Wrap every frost.
26. Take a service plate and wait for 15 minutes.
27. Decorate and serve with reed chocolates and bitter chocolate confection.
28. With its magnificent taste, you can also try the recipe of chocolate frost, which fascinates everyone.

double-almond-chocolate-brownie.name: Double-almond Chocolate Brownie
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast almonds on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop; set aside.

Meanwhile, heat chocolate, butter, and cocoa powder in a medium heatproof bowl set over a medium saucepan of barely simmering water, stirring occasionally, until melted and smooth. Remove from heat and stir in espresso powder and vanilla. Let cool.
Increase oven temperature to 375°. Lightly coat an 8x8" baking dish with nonstick spray, then line with parchment paper, leaving a 2" overhang on 2 sides. Coat parchment with nonstick spray.
Roll out almond paste between 2 sheets of parchment to an 8x8" square (it will be very thin; it’s okay if there are some holes and/or jagged edges).

Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat eggs and salt in a large bowl until foamy, about 5 minutes. Gradually add sugar and continue to beat until very thick and foamy, 5–8 minutes more. Reduce mixer speed to low, add cooled chocolate mixture, and beat to combine. Fold in flour until no streaks remain.

Spread half of batter in prepared pan; smooth top. Lay sheet of almond paste over batter. Spread remaining batter over almond paste; smooth surface. For fudgy brownies, bake until edges are slightly puffed but center is still slightly wobbly, 22–25 minutes. For cakey brownies, bake until edges are puffed but center is set, 25–30 minutes. Immediately top with chocolate wafers and let melt, then spread with an offset spatula to cover top of brownie. Top with reserved almonds and let cool.
Using parchment overhang, lift brownie out of pan and transfer to a cutting board. Cut into 16 squares.
Do Ahead: Brownie can be made 3 days ahead. Wrap tightly in plastic and chill.

doughnut-bread-pudding.name: Doughnut Bread Pudding

ingredients.item: Stale or fresh glazed or sugared doughnuts

instructions: Place a rack in center of oven; preheat to 325°. Butter a 2-qt. baking dish. Cut each doughnut into eighths and arrange on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet. Bake until dry and crisp, like little sugary croutons, about 15 minutes. Let sit until cool enough to handle. (Drying out the doughnut pieces will help them absorb the custard.)

Vigorously whisk eggs, egg yolks, half-and-half, sugar, vanilla, salt, and lemon zest in a large bowl until light, uniform, and foamy. (You can also process in a blender until combined if you want.) Add doughnuts to bowl with custard. Gently toss and push down on them so that they absorb maximum liquid without falling apart. Let sit 5 minutes, then toss and press gently again. Repeat tossing and soaking twice more for a total soak time of 15 minutes, allowing the doughnuts to fully drink up the custard.

Transfer doughnuts and any remaining custard to prepared baking dish. Dollop preserves over, avoiding edges of pan where it can burn during baking. Bake bread pudding, rotating pan halfway through, until puffed, golden brown, and bubbling along the edges, 50–60 minutes.
Let bread pudding cool 20 minutes. Dust with powdered sugar. Serve with cream alongside for pouring over.
Do Ahead: Doughnuts can be baked 1 day ahead. Store in an airtight container at room temperature.

dry-roasted-brown-butter-onions.name: Dry-roasted Brown Butter Onions
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Cut white onions, larger cipolline onions, and shallots almost in half, leaving root ends intact. Pry each open slightly to expose cut sides. Place white onions root side down in a foil-lined roasting pan and roast until just beginning to soften and brown, 75-90 minutes.
Add cipolline onions and shallots to roasting pan root end down and roast until all onions and shallots are soft and deeply colored, about 1 hour longer.

Just before onions finish cooking, melt butter in a small saucepan and cook, swirling occasionally, until butter is brown and smells nutty, 5-8 minutes. Let cool slightly; whisk in vinegar and season brown butter with salt.
Divide onions and shallots among plates, leaving skins on; spoon brown butter over.

dutch-oven-cornbread-with-fig-jam.name: Dutch Oven Cornbread With Fig Jam
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Place butter in a 10-inch-12-inch-diameter Dutch oven, cover, and place in oven to heat pot and melt butter, 6-8 minutes (don't let butter burn). Swirl butter to coat bottom and partway up sides of pan; pour butter into a small bowl and set aside.

Meanwhile, whisk flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking soda, salt, and baking powder in a large bowl. Whisk eggs and milk in a medium bowl; add to cornmeal mixture along with reserved melted butter and whisk to combine. Scrape batter into hot Dutch oven.

Cover and bake until cornbread has started to set around edges, 10-12 minutes. Dot surface with jam. Cover and bake until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 15-20 minutes longer. Let cool, uncovered, 15 minutes. To serve, cut cornbread into wedges.

dutch-oven-jalapeno-cheddar-bread.name: Dutch Oven Jalapeño Cheddar Bread

ingredients.prep: seeded and coarsely chopped, plus 1, sliced into rings, divided

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the bread flour, 2 cups (200 g) of cheddar cheese, the chopped jalapeños, and salt. Stir well.
In a separate large bowl, combine the warm water and yeast. Pour the flour mixture on top of the water and use a silicone spatula to stir until the dough comes together.

With the spatula, fold the dough around the edges of the bowl toward the center, rotating the bowl each time and folding a total of 8 times. Cover with a kitchen towel and let rest in a warm place for 60 minutes, or until almost doubled in size.
Using the spatula, fold the dough toward the center again 8 more times. Cover with the towel and let rest for 30 minutes.
Place the Dutch oven and lid in the oven and preheat to 450˚F (230˚C) for 30 minutes.

Lightly flour a clean work surface and your hands. Carefully peel the dough out of the bowl and onto the floured surface. Flip over and carefully brush away excess flour. Fold the edges of the dough towards the center 8 times, then flip over the dough and transfer to a piece of parchment paper.

Brush the top of the dough with the olive oil, so the cheese will stick. Sprinkle the remaining ½ cup (50 g) of cheese on top. Use a sharp knife to score the bread with an “X”, which will allow steam to escape. Arrange the jalapeño rings on top of the cheese.

Carefully remove the Dutch oven from the oven and use the parchment to lift the bread into the pot. Cover with the lid and bake for 30 minutes, then remove the lid and bake for 20 more minutes, until the bread is golden brown.
Carefully slide the bread out of the pot and onto a wire rack. Remove the parchment paper and let the bread cool for at least 1 hour before slicing.
Slice the bread and serve as desired.
Enjoy!
